steps.t: Amalíbi sent you to speak with Nangar about what you found and how best to proceed with this new knowledge. Return to Jirush and inform Nangar of all …
Nangar believes Jombahok can be incited by Khârdu's words. He asks that you visit Zidemel to have the proper ink made to draft a curse from Khârdu tow…
You acquired the eight drams of scorpion blood Zidemel needs to make the ink. Return the scorpion blood to Zidemel at Jirush.
Zidemel sent you to Malgat. Find him at his hovel in Jirush.
Malgat explained that Khârdu often pays travelling hunters bounties to clear beasts from the wastes of Khûd Zagin. He asks that you acquire a bounty p…
You found a posting near the Ordâkhai encampment south and east from Jirush. You assume it is written by Khârdu. Return the bounty posting to Malgat f…
Malgat confirmed the posting was written by Khârdu. He then directed you to deliver the ink and posting to Nangar for further instruction.
Nangar is pleased with all you have done. He requests that you take the ink and the posting to Galamê. Galamê will use the ink and posting to create a…
Galamê states he can replicate Khârdu's writing. The papyrus he has, however, is not the same quality as Khârdu uses, and to make the curse authentic …
Sûlmur provided you with a sheaf of papyrus and asked for Galamê's patronage. She then pledged her sword and asked you to request the swords of Khûd Z…
Galamê returns a letter to you written in Ordâkhin. He tells you it will incite violence between the two captains and asks that you deliver it to Nang…
Nangar trusts the efforts of the other elders and appreciates your role in acquiring the letter. He puts his faith in you and the other elders and sen…
